citeinfo.origin: Arkansas State Highway and Transportation Department
citeinfo.title: asdi.planning_cadastre.PLSS_TOWNSHIP_AHTD

pubinfo.publish: Arkansas State Highway and Transportation Department

descript.abstract: The Township Range database contains (known line work / or source information) from the USGS Topographic Maps, Bureau of Land Management General Land Office Records, Arkansas County Assessor’s Office, Clay County Assessor’s Office, Crittenden County Assessor’s Office, Cross County Assessor’s Office, Desha County Assessor’s Office, Greene County Assessor’s Office, Jefferson County Assessor’s Office, Lee County Assessor’s Office, Logan County Assessor’s Office, Monroe County Assessor’s Office, Phillips County Assessor’s Office, Pulaski County Assessor’s Office, St. Francis County Assessor’s Office, White County Assessor’s Office, Yell County Assessor’s Office, State of Arkansas Land Commission, and Arkansas Department of Agriculture (State Surveyors Office).
descript.purpose: For reference purposes this file depicts Township and Range line work for the state of Arkansas. The digital dataset may help assist various local, state, federal agencies, the general public and industries. This updated digital dataset can benefit those engaged in civil planning & development, commercial planning & development, natural resource exploration & production and disaster planning & response.

idinfo.useconst: Individuals or companies may use and can utilize the data as a base for their individual purposes.

cntorgp.cntorg: Arkansas State Highway and Transportation Department

idinfo.datacred: In all cases, a credit line stating "Base Map Provided by the Mapping Section, Planning and ResearchDivision, Arkansas State Highway and Transportation Department, In Cooperation With The U.S. Department of Transportation"
idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.3.0.4322

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

distinfo.distliab: See access and use constraints information.

cntorgp.cntorg: Arkansas State Highway and Transportation Department

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
